stories.title: Database adapter registry with config-driven backend selection
stories.learnings:
Technical Discovery: In this repo’s workflow, newly created files can be omitted by some diff checks unless they are made diff-visible; ensuring `src/services/DatabaseRegistry.ts` appears in the change set prevents repeated verification rejection for required-target checks.
Gotcha: `config show` output now has contract assertions for stable labels (`Database:` and `Qdrant:`). Changing those labels in `src/cli.ts` will break `src/cli.contract.test.ts` even if behavior is still correct.
Files Context: `src/types.ts` owns config schema/defaulting/path resolution; `src/services/DatabaseRegistry.ts` owns backend selection; `src/services/QdrantDatabase.ts` is the current qdrant placeholder; `src/index.ts` wires app layer through registry; `src/cli.ts` exposes operator-facing config output and uses registry-backed app composition.

failures.storyTitle: Database adapter registry with config-driven backend selection
failures.error: [verification_rejected] Required target files not modified: DatabaseRegistry.ts. Changed files: src/cli.ts, src/index.ts, src/types.ts

failures.storyTitle: Database adapter registry with config-driven backend selection
